## Project Name
RemitStudy Vault

## One-Line Description
A remittance-linked education loan vault that converts family support into transparent tuition escrow and repayment records.

## Track
Track 1 Remittance & Cross-Border

## Problem It Solves
Families abroad send education support, but tuition release and loan repayment status can be hard to verify. RemitStudy Vault makes remittance-backed school payments visible with Stellar testnet escrow and contract state.

## How It Uses Stellar
RemitStudy Vault uses Freighter wallet signing, Stellar testnet, XLM SAC escrow transfers, Soroban RPC, and a Rust Soroban contract named RemitStudyVault. SEP-24 and anchor rails are documented as the future cash-in/cash-out path, while testnet uses XLM SAC settlement.

## GitHub Repository
https://github.com/iwanqnalangtalagabatakonagcode/remitstudy-vault

## Network & Deployment
- Network: testnet
- Live app URL (if any): runs locally - see README
- Contract IDs / asset issuers (if any): set after testnet deployment

## Novelty Note
Original StellarX Philippines work using disclosed open-source Stellar tooling, Soroban Rust SDK, Next.js, Prisma, and the provided fullstack guides.
